backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all contact email addresses in the codebase have been audited and corrected to sv.couverture95@gmail.com, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend file's purpose and recent changes, covering SEO, styling, components, and public assets.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for VERDIER COUVERTURE with comprehensive meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data, canonical URL, and Google Site Verification.
frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.h: Static HTML file used for Google Search Console ownership verification via the google-site-verification meta tag.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers full access and pointing to the absolute sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap with a single entry for the site's canonical root URL, last modified 2025-07-17 with monthly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, ServiceAreas, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section presenting VERDIER COUVERTURE's history since 2004, company values (quality, experience, responsiveness), and certifications in a two-column layout.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis request form that constructs and opens a mailto: link to sv.couverture95@gmail.com with pre-filled subject and body, plus a confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details (phone/email/address), service links, navigation links, and a copyright bar for Verdier Couverture.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, geo-targeted subheadline, key highlights, and CTA buttons to scroll to contact or services.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a phone CTA, and a responsive hamburger menu that changes background on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: Section listing ~40 Val-d'Oise cities served and 12 service keywords as tag clouds, optimized for local SEO.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of six roofing services (réfection, tuiles, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, traitement) each with an image, description, and feature list.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with six hardcoded French customer reviews for VERDIER COUVERTURE, displaying star ratings, service type, date, and reviewer initials in a grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm earthy OKLCH color palette (terracotta, slate, cream), typography rules using Playfair Display and Inter, and reusable component utility classes for the roofing site theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH brand colors (terracotta, slate, offwhite), serif/sans font families, box shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 35) tracking the VERDIER COUVERTURE roofing landing page, listing existing features, known issues (SEO, scroll bugs, contact form), and architectural notes about the static HTML/React setup.
